title: Siemens Xcelerator | Siemens
body: Digital transformation Siemens Xcelerator Siemens Xcelerator is an open digital business platform where companies of any size can find, try, and buy the technologies they need to run better. It brings together solutions from Siemens and certified partners in one marketplace to help solve industrial challenges. Overview Siemens Xcelerator 1700+ 1700+ Solutions A growing portfolio of software, IoT-enabled hardware and digital services designed to solve real industrial challenges - from predictive maintenance to energy optimization. Explore our products 400+ 400+ Certified sellers A global network of technology partners, integrators, and developers delivering specialized expertise and industry-specific solutions to the marketplace. Explore the ecosystem 5 5 Core domains Our solutions span five core domains - industry, buildings, electrification, grids and transportation - with global partner support and free trials available for selected software offerings. See how it works Overcoming operational challenges A smarter path to digital transformation Discover how small and mid-sized manufacturers can overcome the challenges of digital transformation. Many small and mid-sized manufacturers struggle to know where to begin when improving their operations with technology. With multiple priorities, from production planning to supply chain and customer management, it’s easy to end up with disconnected tools and rising costs. This video shows how Siemens Xcelerator helps you gain a clear understanding of your current operations, identify high-impact improvement areas, and build a practical, tailored roadmap. Measurable impact Real results across industries Traditional industrial software procurement takes 6–12 months. With Siemens Xcelerator, you can start a free trial today, connect to your shop floor this week, and see your first production insights before the month is over. Industrial AI delivers value when it improves performance. - 40% - 40% Reduced ramp-up time Manufacturers use digital twins to reduce ramp-up time by up to 40%. 25% 25% Reduced utility costs Campus operators cut utility costs by 25% per square foot. 100% 100% Collision-free machining trials Industrial companies run collision-free machining trials with 100% reliability. How Siemens Xcelerator works Different industries. Different priorities. One approach: connect data, apply intelligence, improve outcomes. Find the right solution for your business Start with what matters to you: Browse by industry (manufacturing, buildings, energy, mobility) or by problem (reduce downtime, cut energy costs, connect legacy equipment, monitor production). Solutions are tagged by real business outcomes. All listings are vetted and certified for interoperability and cybersecurity standards. The marketplace offers solutions across deployment models - cloud, on-premise, and hybrid - with flexible pricing options including subscriptions, one-time licenses, and free trials from Siemens and 400+ specialist partners. Try and deploy with confidence Many software solutions offer free trials. Test with your own data before making a decision. When you’re ready, connect with certified local integrators and Siemens experts who know your industry. Get guided onboarding, training, and technical support from Siemens and its partner network. Access training and onboarding resources. Scale what works Start with one site, one line, or one building. Expand step by step as results prove out. Subscription and as-a-service models let you grow without large upfront investments. What makes it different One marketplace. Many solutions. Find and deploy hardware, software and digital services from Siemens and certified partners - all in one place. Open. Secure. Ready to integrate. All solutions are vetted for interoperability and cybersecurity, designed to work seamlessly with existing systems. Built for real operations Works with your existing PLCs, SCADA and ERP systems. Frequently asked questions What is Siemens Xcelerator? Siemens Xcelerator is an open digital business platform for industrial companies. It combines a curated marketplace of IoT-enabled hardware, software, and digital services with a partner ecosystem of 700+ certified sellers and a community of developers and integrators. It serves companies across manufacturing, buildings, energy grids, and mobility — from small businesses to global enterprises. Does Siemens Xcelerator only include Siemens products? No. Siemens Xcelerator is an open marketplace. In addition to Siemens hardware, software and digital services, the platform includes solutions from 700+ certified partners and specialist providers. All marketplace offerings are vetted for interoperability, cybersecurity and quality standards. This allows customers to combine Siemens technologies with complementary third-party solutions in one curated environment. How is Siemens Xcelerator different from buying Siemens products directly? The Siemens Xcelerator marketplace brings together solutions from both Siemens and certified third-party partners in one place. Instead of navigating multiple sales channels, you can browse, compare, and trial solutions from hundreds of providers - all pre-tested for interoperability. Think of it as a curated industrial app store with expert support built in. How much do Siemens Xcelerator products and solutions cost? Pricing depends on the solution. Many offerings use subscription or pay-as-you-go models, so you pay only for what you use with no large upfront investment. Free trials (typically 3 months) are available for core software solutions, letting you test with your own data before committing. Can small businesses use Siemens Xcelerator? Yes. Siemens Xcelerator is designed for companies of all sizes. Solutions range from lightweight edge monitoring apps for a single production line to enterprise-scale digital twin platforms. The marketplace lets you filter by company size, budget, and deployment complexity. Who can sell on the Siemens Xcelerator marketplace? Technology companies, system integrators, and solution providers can apply to become Siemens Xcelerator sellers. All marketplace offerings go through Siemens’ technical and commercial governance to ensure quality, security (ISO 27001, IEC 62443), and interoperability. Visit the Ecosystem page to learn about becoming a partner. What industries does Siemens Xcelerator serve? Xcelerator covers five main domains: industry, buildings, electrification, grids and transportation. Within these, solutions address specific verticals including food and beverage, pharmaceuticals, automotive, data centers, and more.
